question: Which of the following is true about the monthly rainfall pattern during the year?

options.A: The rainfall remained constant throughout the year.
options.B: Rainfall was highest in March and lowest in September.
options.C: Rainfall was highest in September and lowest in March.
options.D: Rainfall steadily declined over the first half of the year.

explanation: The inverted Y-axis makes it appear that the series is flipped vertically, which can swap the perceived highs and lows. The correct option matches the actual data values.
